title: Grocery Shopping
description: Buy milk, eggs, bread, and fruits for the week.

title: Clean the Kitchen
description: Wipe down counters, wash dishes, and sweep the floor.

title: Call Mom
description: Check in and see how her day was.

title: Pay Utility Bills
description: Settle electricity, water, and internet bills online.

title: Plan Weekend Trip
description: Research destinations and book accommodation for the upcoming weekend.

title: Read 'Dune'
description: Finish reading the first book of the Dune series.

title: Exercise for 30 minutes
description: Go for a jog or do a home workout.

title: Organize Digital Photos
description: Sort and backup photos from the last year.

title: Prepare Presentation Slides
description: Create slides for tomorrow's team meeting.

title: Water the Plants
description: Give all indoor and outdoor plants a good watering.

title: Write Blog Post
description: Draft an article about new web development trends.

title: Review Project Proposal
description: Provide feedback on the latest project proposal document.

title: Fix Leaky Faucet
description: Troubleshoot and repair the dripping faucet in the bathroom.

title: Meal Prep for Next Week
description: Cook and portion meals for healthy lunches and dinners.

title: Learn a New Recipe
description: Attempt to cook a new dish from a cookbook or online tutorial.

title: Update Resume
description: Add recent work experience and skills to the resume.

title: Service the Car
description: Take the car for its routine oil change and check-up.

title: Research Investment Options
description: Look into different investment strategies and opportunities.

title: Back up Computer Files
description: Create a full backup of important documents and media.

title: Practice Guitar
description: Spend an hour practicing scales and new chords.
